description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: coverage on a self-hosted runner and build on ubuntu-latest. The coverage job checks out the code, updates apt, runs autogen, configure, make, and make check, then uploads coverage data to Coveralls. The build job checks out the code, updates apt, installs required packages, runs autogen, configure, make, and make distcheck, then uploads a Linux 64-bit build artifact.
